mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO coverage_node_stats( coverage_set_id, commit_id, node_type, node_key, parent_key, display_name, source_file, line_missed, line_covered, branch_missed, branch_covered, instruction_missed, instruction_covered, complexity_missed, complexity_covered, method_missed, method_covered, class_missed, class_covered ) VALUES
( #{item.coverageSetId}, #{item.commitId}, #{item.nodeType}, #{item.nodeKey}, #{item.parentKey}, #{item.displayName}, #{item.sourceFile}, #{item.lineMissed}, #{item.lineCovered}, #{item.branchMissed}, #{item.branchCovered}, #{item.instructionMissed}, #{item.instructionCovered}, #{item.complexityMissed}, #{item.complexityCovered}, #{item.methodMissed}, #{item.methodCovered}, #{item.classMissed}, #{item.classCovered} )
